title: After Enies Lobby
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #9, Franky, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #9, Franky, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: To Whomever visits the restaurant now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: shush, guys!! You ought to be ashamed!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: So these people are Luffy's friends.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This nose has gotta be the captain's!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No one in the village believed us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I knew Kaya-san would believe us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's make it with play- doh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Huh? Kaya-san, where are you going!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Eeeh!? Why not!!? He's super cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Teach us how to be pirates, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: For real? Don't lie to us, sense!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: sigh, he's such a bad role model.

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #9, Franky, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby.
